picks.title: VP, Partnerships
picks.snippet: Checkr is looking for a VP, Partnerships to help scale the company's efforts to drive demand across Enterprise, Mid-Market and SMB customers. Manage our key alliance relationships, partnership planning and joint bookings goal setting, and operational execution with HR Technology vendors (ATS, HRIS).

industry.note: 🎯 Core domain: hr tech, background screening

picks.fullDescription: Jobs at Checkr Current openings at Checkr About Checkr Checkr builds people infrastructure for the future of work. We've designed a faster—and fairer—way to screen job seekers. Established in 2014, Checkr puts modern technology powered by machine learning in the hands of hiring teams, helping to hire great new people with an experience that’s fast, smooth, and safe. Checkr has over 100,000 customers including DoorDash, Coinbase, Lyft, Instacart, and Airtable. A career at Checkr means collaborating with brilliant minds, disrupting an industry, and opening channels of employment to often overlooked candidates. Checkr has been recognized as one of BuiltIn's 2023 Best Places to Work in the US and is a Y Combinator 2023 Breakthrough Company. Create a Job Alert Level-up your career by having opportunities at Checkr sent directly to your inbox. picks.title: VP, Partnerships
picks.snippet: Accomplished and visionary executive to take on the role of VP, Partnerships. Reporting directly to the EVP, Americas and serving as a key member of the leadership team.

picks.title: Alliance Director - HR Tech & Fintech Partnerships
picks.snippet: Results-driven Alliance Director to lead and expand regional and global partnerships in the HR tech and fintech space. Focus on driving revenue through co-selling initiatives with ISVs, fintech, GSIs, MSPs.

picks.title: Head of Partnerships
picks.snippet: Mission to leverage past record of success launching and growing partner programs to build and sustain Deel's partner marketplace and sales partnerships. Responsible for finding and managing partners.
